Name: Convex - Export Data
Description:
Exports a snapshot of your Convex deployment's data to a local file using the [Convex CLI](https://docs.convex.dev/cli). Designed to be run before a production deployment as a data backup or rollback safety net.

The export file can optionally be captured as an Octopus build artifact for storage and auditing.

Properties.Octopus.Action.Script.ScriptBody:
deployKey=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexExport.DeployKey")
outputPath=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexExport.OutputPath")
deploymentType=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexExport.DeploymentType")
previewName=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexExport.PreviewName")
workingDir=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexExport.WorkingDirectory")
captureArtifact=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexExport.CaptureAsArtifact")
cmdTimeout=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexExport.CommandTimeout")

if [ -z "$deployKey" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: ConvexExport.DeployKey is required."
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$deploymentType" ]; then
  deploymentType="prod"
fi

if [ -z "$cmdTimeout" ]; then
  cmdTimeout="600"
fi

export CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY="$deployKey"

if [ -n "$workingDir" ]; then
  echo "Changing to working directory: $workingDir"
  cd "$workingDir" || { echo "ERROR: Could not change to directory '$workingDir'"; exit 1; }
fi

timestamp=$(date +"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")

if [ -z "$outputPath" ]; then
  outputPath="convex-export-${timestamp}.zip"
fi

deploymentFlag=""
case "$deploymentType" in
  prod)
    deploymentFlag="--prod"
    ;;
  preview)
    if [ -z "$previewName" ]; then
      echo "ERROR: ConvexExport.PreviewName is required when deployment type is 'preview'."
      exit 1
    fi
    deploymentFlag="--preview-name $previewName"
    ;;
  dev)
    deploymentFlag=""
    ;;
esac

ensure_node() {
  if command -v npx &>/dev/null; then
    echo "Node.js found: $(node --version)"
    return 0
  fi
  export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"
  if [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ]; then
    \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
    if command -v npx &>/dev/null; then
      echo "Node.js loaded via nvm: $(node --version)"
      return 0
    fi
  fi
  echo "Node.js not found. Installing via nvm..."
  curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.7/install.sh | bash
  \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
  nvm install --lts
  echo "Node.js installed: $(node --version)"
}
ensure_node

echo "Exporting Convex data from: $deploymentType"
echo "Output file: $outputPath"

timeout "$cmdTimeout" npx convex export $deploymentFlag --path "$outputPath"

exitCode=$?
if [ $exitCode -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Convex export failed with exit code $exitCode."
  exit $exitCode
fi

if [ ! -f "$outputPath" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Export completed but output file not found at '$outputPath'."
  exit 1
fi

fileSize=$(du -sh "$outputPath" | cut -f1)
echo "Export complete. File: $outputPath ($fileSize)"

if [ "$captureArtifact" = "True" ]; then
  new_octopusartifact "$outputPath"
  echo "Export captured as Octopus artifact."
fi

Parameters.Name: ConvexExport.DeployKey
Parameters.Label: Deploy Key
Parameters.HelpText:
The Convex deploy key for the target project. Store this as a sensitive Octopus variable.

See: [Creating deploy keys](https://docs.convex.dev/cli#deploy-keys)

Parameters.Name: ConvexExport.OutputPath
Parameters.Label: Output File Path
Parameters.HelpText:
Optional. The local path where the export ZIP file should be written.

Defaults to `convex-export-{timestamp}.zip` in the current working directory if left blank.

Parameters.Name: ConvexExport.DeploymentType
Parameters.Label: Deployment Type
Parameters.HelpText:
The Convex deployment to export data from.

- `prod` — production deployment (default)
- `preview` — preview deployment (requires a preview name)
- `dev` — development deployment

Parameters.Name: ConvexExport.PreviewName
Parameters.Label: Preview Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the preview deployment. Only required when **Deployment Type** is `preview`.

Parameters.Name: ConvexExport.WorkingDirectory
Parameters.Label: Working Directory
Parameters.HelpText: Optional. Path to the directory containing your Convex project. Defaults to the current working directory if left blank.

Parameters.Name: ConvexExport.CaptureAsArtifact
Parameters.Label: Capture as Octopus Artifact
Parameters.HelpText: When enabled, the exported file will be captured as an Octopus build artifact, making it available for download from the deployment details page.

Parameters.Name: ConvexExport.CommandTimeout
Parameters.Label: Command Timeout (seconds)
Parameters.HelpText: Maximum number of seconds to wait for the export to complete. Defaults to 600 (10 minutes). Large datasets may require a higher value.
